hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '(--target prod|snowflake.*production|DROP TABLE|TRUNCATE)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Production target or destructive SQL detected. dbt prod runs require Elena Marsh approval. Review safety_checklist.md.'; exit 1; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '(profiles\.yml|account_id.*=|password.*=|private_key)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Possible Snowflake credential in file write. Never commit profiles.yml or credentials.'; exit 1; fi
echo 'Model written. Reminder: run dbt test before raising PR. Check eval_checklist.md for model quality checks.'
echo 'Session complete. Before closing: (1) run dbt test on changed models, (2) confirm no prod target used, (3) check schema.yml descriptions are present.'
